customers.name: Enterprise CPO Operations Director
customers.description: Senior leader at a large European Charge Point Operator responsible for operating and scaling thousands of public and semi-public EV charge points. Accountable for uptime, regulatory compliance, roaming interoperability, and long-term profitability of the charging network.
careAbout: Regulatory compliance (AFIR, MID, local energy rules)
Cost control and margin per kWh
winsThem: High platform uptime SLA and monitoring capabilities
Transparent pricing and predictable SaaS cost model
theirFear: Inability to integrate acquired charging networks
Margin erosion from inefficient energy management

jobsToBeDone.name: Scale and Operate a Pan-European Charging Network
jobsToBeDone.what_it_is: Deploy, monitor, and optimize a large EV charging network across multiple countries while maintaining high uptime and interoperability.
jobsToBeDone.outcome: A profitable, reliable, and compliant charging network with high utilization and customer satisfaction.

productStrategy.vision: Be the most reliable and scalable Charge Point Management Platform in Europe, enabling CPOs to operate at million-point scale.

customerJourneyStories.name: Scale and Operate a Pan-European Charging Network
customerJourneyStories.summary: Enterprise CPO Operations Director moves from recognizing that backend instability causing downtime to repeatedly achieving a profitable, reliable, and compliant charging network with high utilization and customer satisfaction through a journey that proves proven scalability to 100k+ charge points and protects network uptime and reliability.

stages.narrative: The journey starts when Enterprise CPO Operations Director sees that backend instability causing downtime is no longer acceptable, or when the current way of working can no longer protect network uptime and reliability.
Discovery happens when the offering shows up with proof points that connect directly to scale and operate a pan-european charging network and signal proven scalability to 100k+ charge points.

Enterprise CPO Operations Director evaluates whether the solution is relevant, easy to understand, and credible enough to improve network uptime and reliability without creating vendor lock-in without roadmap influence.

The trial succeeds when Enterprise CPO Operations Director can quickly experience onboard new charge points and ensure network uptime with limited friction and can see early evidence that deploy, monitor, and optimize a large EV charging network across multiple countries while maintaining high uptime and interoperability will work in the real environment.

Engagement deepens as Enterprise CPO Operations Director uses the product to make optimize energy usage and enable roaming part of normal operations, turning the initial promise into dependable day-to-day value anchored in high platform uptime SLA and monitoring capabilities.

Retention comes when the product keeps making value visible through charger Uptime %, the product continues to make scale and operate a pan-european charging network easier and more dependable over time, and gives Enterprise CPO Operations Director confidence that staying is safer than switching back or moving elsewhere.

customerJourneyStories.name: Provide Seamless Charging Access Across Europe

The trial succeeds when Head of Product at eMSP can quickly experience integrate with CPMS platforms and authorize charging sessions with limited friction and can see early evidence that enable EV drivers to charge at thousands of third-party networks with a single app or card will work in the real environment.

Engagement deepens as Head of Product at eMSP uses the product to make reconcile and settle transactions part of normal operations, turning the initial promise into dependable day-to-day value anchored in real-time authorization APIs.

Retention comes when the product keeps making value visible through authorization Success Rate, the product continues to make provide seamless charging access across europe easier and more dependable over time, and gives Head of Product at eMSP confidence that staying is safer than switching back or moving elsewhere.

customers.name: Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition)
customers.description: Fleet manager at a mid-to-large enterprise transitioning from ICE to electric vehicles. Responsible for total cost of ownership, driver reimbursement, charging policy enforcement, and ESG reporting.
winsThem: Unified billing across networks and countries
Policy controls for tariffs and charging limits
Integration with HR and expense systems

customerJourneyStories.name: Manage and Optimize EV Fleet Charging Costs
customerJourneyStories.summary: Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) moves from recognizing that uncontrolled roaming costs to repeatedly achieving reduced TCO and simplified administration while supporting ESG goals through a journey that proves unified billing across networks and countries and protects total cost of ownership (TCO).

stages.narrative: The journey starts when Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) sees that uncontrolled roaming costs is no longer acceptable, or when the current way of working can no longer protect total cost of ownership (TCO).
Discovery happens when the offering shows up with proof points that connect directly to manage and optimize ev fleet charging costs and signal unified billing across networks and countries.

Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) evaluates whether the solution is relevant, easy to understand, and credible enough to improve total cost of ownership (TCO) without creating manual reimbursement processes.

The trial succeeds when Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) can quickly experience provide drivers with access and track and analyze charging spend with limited friction and can see early evidence that control, monitor, and optimize charging expenses for a distributed EV fleet will work in the real environment.

Engagement deepens as Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) uses the product to make reimburse home charging part of normal operations, turning the initial promise into dependable day-to-day value anchored in detailed fleet-level reporting dashboards.

Retention comes when the product keeps making value visible through average Cost per kWh, the product continues to make manage and optimize ev fleet charging costs easier and more dependable over time, and gives Corporate Fleet Manager (EV Transition) confidence that staying is safer than switching back or moving elsewhere.
